title: Fingees Mod
description: be everything from the fingees videos
body:
![text says "be everything from every fingees video". image shows two GUI examples of Minecraft players dressed up as creatures and cosmetics from YouTuber fingees' videos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9853d235316faba1ccf88c40f049a9f39be0bccd_0.webp)

A cosmetic mod by [fingees](https://youtube.com/@fingees_yt) that lets you turn yourself into everything from my videos, from oranges to OJ Simpson
![Minecraft players dressed up as OJ Simpson, Homer Simpson, a strong version of Minecraft Steve, a cat, and a sleep paralysis demon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/796051c260e274e3be74db2e4026b270fa9df132_0.webp)

Everyone with the mod installed can see your Fingees Fashion, no matter what server or LAN world you're on
![Text that says "i give you a new cosmetic every day", along with Minecraft Steve fused with a bunch of Minecraft pigs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f861692e2e9da3052837a7e7ac66b04b5a9bc765_0.webp)

Press G to open the menu

Please email me with any bugs hello@fingees.co
